xtce:MetaCommand.name: NOOP
xtce:MetaCommand.shortDescription: No operation command for link verification

xtce:MetaCommand.name: GET_STATUS
xtce:MetaCommand.shortDescription: Request an immediate telemetry snapshot (all periodic packets)

xtce:MetaCommand.name: SET_POWER
xtce:MetaCommand.shortDescription: Set power state of a subsystem

xtce:MetaCommand.name: SAVE_CONFIG
xtce:MetaCommand.shortDescription: Save current configuration to storage slot

xtce:MetaCommand.name: PAYLOAD_ON
xtce:MetaCommand.shortDescription: Power on payload and begin data collection

xtce:MetaCommand.name: PAYLOAD_OFF
xtce:MetaCommand.shortDescription: Power down payload and stop data collection

xtce:MetaCommand.name: PAYLOAD_CONFIG
xtce:MetaCommand.shortDescription: Configure payload integration time and gain

xtce:MetaCommand.name: PAYLOAD_FLUSH
xtce:MetaCommand.shortDescription: Flush payload data buffer to telemetry stream

xtce:MetaCommand.name: INJECT_FAULT
xtce:MetaCommand.shortDescription: Inject a simulated fault into the vehicle

xtce:MetaCommand.name: SET_ORBIT_EPOCH
xtce:MetaCommand.shortDescription: Reset orbit epoch time to start fresh propagation

xtce:MetaCommand.name: SET_ORBIT_ELEMENTS
xtce:MetaCommand.shortDescription: Set orbital regime, altitude, and inclination

xtce:MetaCommand.name: SET_GROUND_STATION
xtce:MetaCommand.shortDescription: Set ground station coordinates for contact prediction

xtce:MetaCommand.name: ADCS_SLEW_TO_QUATERNION
xtce:MetaCommand.shortDescription: Slew to a target attitude quaternion

xtce:DefaultSignificance.reasonForWarning: Three-wheel vehicle: losing one wheel loses full 3-axis control
Attitude knowledge invalid until the estimator reconverges
